race.comment: CLEVOR TREVER (2) looks the one to beat again. He's a progressive colt who has won both this time in, well backed fresh before overcoming trouble to score at Caulfield last start. Put up a good number there and handles all ground, perhaps the only slight niggle is he could be looking for 1600m but expecting him to win again. UNDISPUTABLE (6) wasn't in the best ground behind CLEVOR TREVER at Caulfield and has to be respected up on speed. CARDAMOM (13) is third-up now and is trending the right way. Her recent jumpout between runs was solid and it wouldn't surprise to see her play a leading role with no weight on her back. ZEBRA FINCH (7) was solid first-up on a heavy deck and can't be ruled out.
